title: better mod client
description: a better minecraft fps mod pack.Have iris emf etf minimap.
body:
# better mc optimize
This mod pack makes it easy to optimize your old computer. Built-in ETF and EMF, you can install special resource packs, a minimap to view your tracks, and a built-in server to play. The client frame rate easily rises to 500fps, the CIT can install opfine resources, and the whole mod package is only for one thing - frame rate optimization
